channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PREMIERPOL] Promoter Group Company, D L Millar & Co Ltd, Acquires 0.02% Stake in Premier Polyfilm Ltd
item.description:
Premier Polyfilm Ltd, a company listed on the BSE Limited & NSE Limited, has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from D L MILLAR & CO LTD, a promoter group company. D L MILLAR & CO LTD has acquired 18,392 equity shares, which is 0.02% of the total shareholding of Premier Polyfilm Ltd, through open market transactions on the NSE and BSE on 19th March 2026.

  • D L MILLAR & CO LTD, a promoter group company of Premier Polyfilm Ltd, acquired 18,392 equity shares, which is 0.02% of the total shareholding of Premier Polyfilm Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through open market transactions on the NSE and BSE on 19th March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIER POLYFILM LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GTV] GTV Engineering Approves Loan, Preferential Issue of Equity Shares, and Acquisition of Chirchind Hydro Power Private Limited Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GTV Engineering Ltd. has approved a proposal to give loans, guarantees, provide security, and/or make investments exceeding the prescribed limits under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013. The Board also approved a preferential issue of equity shares (share swap) worth up to Rs. 100 crore, and the acquisition of 1,12,56,250 equity shares of Chirchind Hydro Power Private Limited (CHPPL) through a share swap from GTV Infrastructures Private Limited. This acquisition will make CHPPL a subsidiary of GTV Engineering Ltd., and Shivalik Energy Private Limited a step-down subsidiary. The Board also approved the execution of a Share Swap Agreement between M/s GTV Engineering Limited and M/s GTV Infrastructures Private Limited and the related party transaction(s) in connection with the proposed acquisition and preferential issue.

  • Approval of loans, guarantees, security, and/or investments exceeding the prescribed limits under Section 186 of the Companies Act, 2013
  • Preferential issue of equity shares worth up to Rs. 100 crore
  • Acquisition of 1,12,56,250 equity shares of CHPPL through a share swap
  • CHPPL to become a subsidiary of GTV Engineering Ltd.
  • Execution of a Share Swap Agreement between M/s GTV Engineering Limited and M/s GTV Infrastructures Private Limited
  • Approval of related party transaction(s) in connection with the proposed acquisition and preferential issue

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GTV Engineering Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [WONDERLA] Wonderla Holidays Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure
item.description:
Wonderla Holidays Ltd, in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct and SEBI regulations, has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026, and the window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of financial results for the quarter ended 31st March, 2026.

  • Wonderla Holidays Ltd announces closure of trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026.
  • The window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of financial results for the quarter ended 31st March, 2026.
  • This decision is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct and SEBI regulations.
  • The announcement is a business update from Wonderla Holidays Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wonderla Holidays Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TATACAP] Tata Capital Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
Tata Capital Limited has informed the Exchange about the closure of the Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the company from March 24, 2026, until 48 hours after the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, are declared. The decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The Trading Window will be closed for the Designated Persons of the company and their Related Persons from March 24, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Tata Capital Ltd has announced the closure of the Trading Window until 48 hours after the Q4 and FY26 results.
  • The closure is as per the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.
  • The Trading Window will be closed for the Designated Persons of the company and their Related Persons from March 24, 2026.
  • The closure will last until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tata Capital Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JKCEMENT] Nidhipati Singhania Family Trust Acquires 100 Shares of J.K. Cement Limited from Open Market
item.description:
Nidhipati Singhania Family Trust, a Promoter/Promoter Group of J.K. Cement Limited, has acquired 100 Equity Shares of the company from the open market on 19th March 2026. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Nidhipati Singhania Family Trust, a Promoter/Promoter Group, acquired 100 Equity Shares of J.K. Cement Limited from the open market.
  • The acquisition was made on 19th March 2026.
  • This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: J.K.CEMENT LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Promoter Umesh Vasantlal Modi Acquires Shares Worth INR 10,02,00,000 in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd
item.description:
According to a disclosure made to the stock exchange under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 and Regulation 7(2) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, Umesh Vasantlal Modi, a promoter of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, has acquired shares worth INR 10,02,00,000. The shares were acquired off-market. Before the acquisition, Modi held 23,35,372 shares, which constituted 23.35% of the total voting rights. Post-acquisition, his holding increased to 21,27,872 shares, which is 21.28% of the total voting rights. The acquisition took place on April 09, 2025, and the shares were purchased at INR 10 each. The total equity share capital of the company after the acquisition stands at INR 1,00,20,000.

  • Umesh Vasantlal Modi, a promoter of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, acquires shares worth INR 10,02,00,000
  • The acquisition took place off-market on April 09, 2025
  • Before the acquisition, Modi held 23,35,372 shares, which constituted 23.35% of the total voting rights
  • Post-acquisition, his holding increased to 21,27,872 shares, which is 21.28% of the total voting rights
  • The total equity share capital of the company after the acquisition stands at INR 1,00,20,000

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RANJITSE] Ranjit Securities Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
Ranjit Securities Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all Connected/Designated Person/ Promoters of the Company, effective from April 1, 2026. The closure is in accordance with Regulation 9 of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) (Amendment) Regulation, 2018, and the Companies Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading in its Securities. The trading window will reopen after 48 hours of the declaration of the Audited financial results for the quarter/financial year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the aforesaid Audited financial results is yet to be intimated.

  • Ranjit Securities Ltd closes trading window for all Connected/Designated Person/ Promoters from April 1, 2026.
  • The closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the Companies Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.
  • The trading window will reopen after 48 hours of the declaration of the Audited financial results for Q1 2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the Audited financial results is yet to be announced.
  • Directors, Promoters, Connected Persons, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade during the closure period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ranjit Securities Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [VEDL] Vedanta Ltd Initiates Legal Proceedings Against Adani's Bid for Jaiprakash Associates
item.description:
Vedanta Ltd has moved the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) challenging the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) nod to Adani's bid for acquiring Jaiprakash Associates. This legal proceeding, initiated by the company in its capacity as a stakeholder, does not have any material impact on the operations, financial position, or performance of the company. Vedanta Ltd confirms that it has complied with all disclosure requirements under the SEBI Listing Regulations and will continue to do so, keeping the stock exchange(s) informed of all material information/events.

  • Vedanta Ltd has initiated a legal proceeding against Adani's bid for Jaiprakash Associates
  • The legal action is taken in the capacity as a stakeholder and does not impact the company's operations or financials
  • Vedanta Ltd confirms compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations
  • The company will continue to inform stock exchange(s) of all material information/events

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vedanta Limited | Category: Legal

item.title: [DWARKESH] Gautam Radheshyam Morarka Acquires Shares in Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd. via Open Market
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Gautam Radheshyam Morarka has acquired 0.01% of the total share and voting rights in Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd. The acquisition was made via open market on 20th March 2026. The total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company remains unchanged at 185301470 after the acquisition.

  • Gautam Radheshyam Morarka acquires 0.01% shares in Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd.
  • Acquisition made via open market on 20th March 2026.
  • No change in the total equity share capital and total voting capital of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DWARIKESH SUGAR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NATIONSTD] Trading Window of National Standard (India) Ltd to Close from April 1, 2026
item.description:
National Standard (India) Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the company's securities. The closure will be in effect from April 1, 2026, and will continue for 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The decision is in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring & Reporting of Trading.

  • National Standard (India) Ltd to close its trading window from April 1, 2026.
  • The closure is as per the company's Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring & Reporting of Trading.
  • The trading window will remain closed for 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATIONAL STANDARD (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Business Update
